title: Russia Is Sending a Second Oil Tanker to Fuel-Starved Cuba
summary_full: The announcement of a second shipment follows the arrival of a first oil tanker sent by the Kremlin earlier this week.
summary_public: The announcement of a second shipment follows the arrival of a first oil tanker sent by the Kremlin earlier this week.
